Behold, the moment of alignment is here.
[Visitor] from beyond the doomed and foolish world

Arachne: Sing, lament, weave a web with your sweet tongue. Those ensnared in her web are all puppets to fate.

Chasing purpose on this earth, I call you back to the primordial world. 
The long sleep ends now. 
With the power invested in me, Remuria will be as an eternal kingdom.
Look upon me.
The moment of celestial alignment is now.

When the stars align, the kingdom will rise from the sea.
